question: Will Estonia be the Jury Winner in the Eurovision 2025 Grand Final?
resolution_criteria:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2025 is scheduled for May 17, 2025.

This market will resolve to the country that receives the highest number of points from the professional juries in the Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2025.

All ties will be broken according to EBU's official Eurovision rules.

If no winner is announced by July 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Eurovision (https://eurovision.tv/), including live footage of Eurovision 2025, however a consensus of credible reporting will suffice.
